eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Snohomish, WA; at 12:20 PM ON MAR 10, 2026 Effective until 12:35 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the Snohomish County Department of Emergency Management. Had this been an actual alert, this system would bring you important information. No action is needed. This is a test.
